report.title: Report Incident

report.medical_emergency_desc: Report medical incidents or health issues
report.food_option: 🍽️ Food Shortage - Lack of food supplies

Describe the {type} situation in detail...

Example: Location details, number of people affected, urgency level, specific needs, etc.

report.guideline_affected: • Include number of people affected if known
report.guideline_dangers: • Mention any immediate dangers or urgent needs
report.guideline_contact: • Provide contact information if you can assist
report.please_wait: Please wait while we prepare your report
